name: Tailwind CSS Buttons
summary: A card-style button container with dot pattern background and clipboard icon on hover.
detailedDescription: Tailwind CSS Buttons (ButtonsCard) creates a card-style button container with interactive hover effects. The component has h-60 height, full width, white background (dark: black), rounded-xl corners, and subtle border (neutral-100 light, white/20 dark). On hover, border intensifies to neutral-200. Background features dot pattern (black/[0.1] light, white/[0.1] dark) using absolute inset-0 positioning. Clipboard icon (Tabler Icons) appears at top-right on hover with 200ms transition. Content sits at relative z-40 for proper layering. The card uses overflow-hidden for clipped corners and flex center alignment for content. onClick handler enables button functionality. This creates polished, tactile button cards ideal for component galleries, feature selections, or any context where card-style buttons with subtle hover feedback enhance interaction clarity.
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
